Documents.title: Documents

Marketing.heroSubtitle: Navigating bureaucracy shouldn't be a full-time job. AI automatically tracks your documents, checks eligibility, and plans your next move.
Marketing.ctaSubtitle: Create your secure profile today and let ASI:ONE handle the underlying infrastructure.
Marketing.step1Desc: Securely upload your IDs, certificates, and resumes to your encrypted vault.
Marketing.step2Desc: Paste a link or upload a PDF of the scholarship, internship, or scheme.
Marketing.step3Desc: ASI:ONE reasons through the requirements and tells you exactly where you stand.
Marketing.step4Desc: Follow the prioritized checklist to close gaps and submit your application.
Marketing.feature1Desc: We fortify your AI deployments with robust security protocols. Our team ensures every model adheres to strict data privacy standards.
Marketing.feature2Desc: Tailored AI agents designed for your specific needs. We develop custom logic and workflows that integrate deeply with your existing tools.
Marketing.feature3Desc: Infrastructure optimization for high-traffic AI apps. We ensure your systems remain fast, responsive, and ready for any level of demand.
Marketing.feature4Desc: Transform raw information into actionable intelligence. We build the pipelines and vector stores that power your organization's future.
